raw_response_text:
```xml
<observations>
    <class_44>
        <features>
            <petal_color>deep purple/violet</petal_color>
            <petal_shape>five rounded petals with central dark markings</petal_shape>
            <stamen>prominent yellow stamens</stamen>
            <leaf_texture>green, slightly rough edges</leaf_texture>
        </features>
    </class_44>
    <class_77>
        <features>
            <petal_color>white or light pink</petal_color>
            <petal_shape>large, layered petals with a smooth, rounded appearance</petal_shape>
            <stamen>central yellow stamen</stamen>
            <leaf_texture>broad, smooth green leaves</leaf_texture>
        </features>
    </class_77>
    <class_45>
        <features>
            <petal_color>bright orange or yellow-orange</petal_color>
            <petal_shape>smaller, clustered petals with a tubular form</petal_shape>
            <stamen>small, less prominent stamens</stamen>
            <leaf_texture>green, narrow leaves</leaf_texture>
        </features>
    </class_45>
</observations>

<target_image_analysis>
    <features>
        <petal_color>deep purple/violet</petal_color>
        <petal_shape>five rounded petals with central dark markings</petal_shape>
        <stamen>prominent yellow stamens</stamen>
        <leaf_texture>green, slightly rough edges</leaf_texture>
    </features>
</target_image_analysis>

<response>44</response>
```

```xml
<condition>
    <examples>
        <class_45>
            <description>
                <visual_features>
                    <feature>Bright yellow-orange petals</feature>
                    <feature>Clustered flower arrangement</feature>
                    <feature>Small, tubular shape with visible stamens</feature>
                </visual_features>
            </description>
        </class_45>
        <class_44>
            <description>
                <visual_features>
                    <feature>Purple petals with white veining</feature>
                    <feature>Dark maroon center</feature>
                    <feature>Five distinct petals radiating from center</feature>
                </visual_features>
            </description>
        </class_44>
        <class_77>
            <description>
                <visual_features>
                    <feature>Large, white petals</feature>
                    <feature>Prominent yellow center</feature>
                    <feature>Delicate, layered petals with slight pinkish tint</feature>
                    <feature>Lotus-like appearance</feature>
                </visual_features>
            </description>
        </class_77>
    </examples>
</condition>
<response>77</response>
```
